Ditch Assist DIG™

Stop Wasting 30–60% of Your Day Checking Grade

Live slope and depth guidance replaces your laser so one operator can finish faster with zero rework. No more stopping to check grade, no spotter needed.

One system. One familiar app. All the features you already use in Ditch Assist—now for your excavator. No new software to learn, just seamless expansion when you're ready to add excavator guidance to your operation.

Ditch the Laser. Dig Up to 75% Faster.

Real-time RTK depth & grade guidance—no tripod, no spotter, no stopping.

Upgrade any excavator with effortless on-screen grade accuracy that moves with you as you dig.

Standalone System

Installs in minutes—turn any machine into a grade-ready excavator.

RTK-Powered Accuracy

Precise bucket elevation and slope guidance for perfect results.

Rugged IP67 Hardware

Built for tough worksites—shock, dust & weather-resistant.

Works With Any RTK Source

Bring your own RTK—compatible with all major brands and NTRIP.

No Cab Display Needed

Use your tablet, iPad, or laptop—no proprietary screens to buy.

Wireless & Clutter-Free

No cables through the cab. Clean, simple, reliable.

Game-Changing for Any Job Requiring Grade Accuracy

One-Person Grade Control

No laser, no rod man—work solo with confidence and speed.

Zero Setup, Zero Guesswork

Set a target grade or bench in to a target depth and start digging. Live feedback keeps you on target whether digging a slope or level area.

Works on Any Excavator

Wireless, fast to install, and runs on any device—no full Ditch Assist system required.

View Full Details Request Quote

Which Excavator System Is Right for You?

Choose based on whether you have (or plan to get) Ditch Assist

Ditch Assist X

Expand your Ditch Assist system to excavators and backhoes. Same familiar app, all the features you already use—zero learning curve.

  • Requires Ditch Assist system: Extends your existing investment
  • Familiar interface: Same app you already know and use
  • All DA features: Curved routes, custom designs, Slope-IQ™
  • Best for: Current or future Ditch Assist customers
VS

Ditch Assist DIG

Ditch the laser and dig up to 75% faster. Real-time RTK grade guidance replaces your laser—work solo with no spotter, no tripod, no stopping to check grade.

  • Complete standalone system: Works independently—no Ditch Assist system required
  • One-person operation: Eliminate laser crew costs and delays completely
  • Instant productivity: Set target grade and start digging—live feedback keeps you on target
  • Best for: Excavator-only contractors replacing lasers with RTK accuracy

Still not sure which system fits your needs?

Get Expert Guidance

Why Choose Ditch Assist™?

Ditch Assist™ is a trusted brand of Northern Plains Drainage Systems, proudly engineered and manufactured in Manitoba, Canada. Since 2012, we've been committed to delivering innovative, reliable, and farmer-focused technology that helps you work smarter, not harder. Our grade control systems are built on a foundation of precision, simplicity, and proven performance—backed by a team that understands agriculture because we live it. When you choose Ditch Assist, you're choosing a partner dedicated to your success, with local support, continuous innovation, and equipment designed to deliver results season after season.

⭐

Proven Reliability

Trusted performance, field-tested since 2014

🔧

Built by Drainage Experts

Engineered and manufactured by real people who understand your needs

💡

Continuous Innovation

Regular updates and improvements driven by real-world customer feedback

🤝

Exceptional Dealer Support

Local, expert product knowledge at every step

Drainage and grading mistakes cost valuable time, money, and productivity—don't take risks with unproven solutions. Since 2014, Ditch Assist™, developed and built by Northern Plains Drainage Systems, has delivered consistent, dependable RTK grade control for drainage, land-leveling, and excavation projects across North and South America. Our systems blend years of practical field experience with continuous input from farmers, contractors, and operators to deliver solutions that work reliably in real-world conditions.

With Ditch Assist, you're backed by the industry's most knowledgeable dealers and ongoing support from the very people who engineered and built your system.

Ready to Transform Your Operation?

Get a personalized quote and discover how Ditch Assist can work for you.

Get a Quote Contact Us
